The engine hums with reliable purpose, ready to carry you through city streets and open highways alike. Do not mention exact numeric quality values. Typical price ranges by quality tier: mint $42,500–$50,000, good $27,500–$40,000, fair $14,000–$26,000, poor $2,500–$9,000. Pick a specific price within the typical range for the advertised condition. You may price toward the high or low end depending on your selling strategy. Respond with a single JSON object. Format: {"thought": "<brief reasoning>", "description": "<text>", "price": <number>}
response: {"thought": "With a reputation score of 0.40, I need to build trust. I'll price toward the lower end of the fair range to attract buyers and compensate for lower trust. $15,500 is appealing and honest for fair condition.", "description": "Runs strong.
